hypothesis: Augmenting CompGen with explicit geometric descriptors of the adsorption site—surface facet type, adsorption motif (atop/bridge/hollow), and mean first-shell metal–adsorbate distance—as additional conditioning signals will improve the fidelity and transferability of shell-wise compositions to unseen HEA surfaces, evidenced by lower Fréchet distance and leakage and higher cosine similarity on held-out tasks.
